series_metadata.series_description: Open complaint investigation files including reports, correspondence, records (dental and other) gathered by Enforcement Officers/Investigators

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned or saved into Board enforcement database, then shred physical/paper documentation. ; Electronic: Retain electronic record for seven (7) years after the final action of the Board, then delete unless needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
